summary: Comprehensive testing of L'Apprenti Boulanger bakery learning platform completed successfully. All backend APIs (18 defects, quiz generation, diagnostic scenarios) working perfectly. Frontend components load correctly with technomitron images integrated throughout activities. All 4 levels (SAP, Émotion, BP, BM), 5 activity types (Drag&Drop, Hangman, Crossword, Diagnostic Case, Quick Quiz), and navigation features functioning properly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/defects returns 18 defects with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/quiz/generate?difficulty=facile returns valid questions
Backend: GET /api/diagnostic/scenario returns valid 3-step scenarios
Backend: All API endpoints (categories, stats) working with 100% success rate
Home page shows 5 mode cards including 'Activités interactives'
Activities page at /activites shows 4 level buttons (SAP, Émotion, BP, BM)
Clicking BM level button shows 'Niveau BM — Expert' description
Activities page shows all 5 activity cards (Glisser-Déposer, Le Pendu, Mots Croisés, Cas Diagnostic, Quiz Rapide)
Drag & Drop activity loads correctly with back button functionality
Hangman game loads with clue, letter buttons A-Z, SVG hangman, and technomitron images
Crossword puzzle loads with grid (11 cells found), clues panel, and proper structure
Diagnostic Case loads with technomitron image, context, question, and 4 options
Quick Quiz loads with questions from API integration working properly
Training page /entrainement shows defect image from technomitron (Pain plat example)
Diagnostic page /diagnostic shows 3-step scenario with proper step indicators
Technical Cards /fiches shows 18 defect cards with thumbnail and full images when expanded
Navigation 'Activités' link works and redirects properly
Profile page shows stats (Score total, Réponses totales, Précision, Meilleure série) and badges system
Back button in activities returns to selection grid successfully
Search and filter functionality in Technical Cards works correctly
All technomitron.aainb.com images loading properly across the application
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (21/21 features tested successfully)
